narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 3-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 978 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
